name: watheq-original
description: 1.  **Run the script:**     ```bash     python legal_chunker.py     ``` 2.  **Paste the text:** Copy the legal text from your source and paste it into the terminal. 3.  **Finalize:** Type **`done`** or **`تم`** and press Enter to start processing. 4.  **Check Output:** Your structured JSON will be available in the `output_chunks` folder.
